title: Advanced OSINT Workflow
when_to_use: At the start of any external assessment

steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Run theHarvester to enumerate email addresses and subdomains from public sources
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for advanced osint workflow
steps.expected_output: List of email addresses, subdomains, and associated IPs from the target domain

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Import results to Recon-ng workspace for centralized data management
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: Recon-ng workspace populated with imported contacts, hosts, and domain data

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Run Recon-ng modules such as recon/domains-hosts/hackertarget for additional discovery
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: Additional hosts and domains discovered through Recon-ng's automated modules

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Check crt.sh for certificate transparency records to identify subdomains
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: List of valid subdomains from SSL certificate records

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Search GitHub using target.com-related keywords like password, api_key, or secret
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: Leaked credentials, API keys, or configuration files publicly available on GitHub

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Run SpiderFoot scan to correlate discovered information and identify relationships
steps.expected_output: Correlation analysis linking infrastructure, people, and services together

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Compile all findings into a structured OSINT report with data relationships
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Comprehensive OSINT report showing complete intelligence picture of the target
